name: golang-github-stathat-go-dev
title: golang-github-stathat-go-dev
summary: Go package for reporting stat counts and values to StatHat
description:
Go package for reporting stat counts and values to StatHat
This package is a client for reporting statistics and metrics data to
the StatHat commercial logging product.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-stathat-go-dev because Go package for reporting stat counts and values to StatHat.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-stathat-go-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-stathat-go-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-stathat-go-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
